title: hedeoma hispida
intro: Hedeoma hispida, also known as prickly pennyroyal or hispid pennyroyal, is a perennial herb native to North America. It is a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic. The health benefits of Hedeoma hispida include its potential to relieve digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Hedeoma hispida can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
